summary: Comprehensive testing of Media Preview Modal feature on Step 5 (Resultado) page. All 11 features tested successfully - Book Preview, PDF Preview, Video Player, Gallery View, scene navigation, download buttons, close functionality (X button and Escape key), and arrow key navigation all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test project fce897cf6ba3 with 20 scenes, 21 videos, 20 storyboard panels (84 frames total)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Media Preview Modal feature fully tested and working. Test credentials: test@agentflow.com / password123. Project ID: fce897cf6ba3. All preview types (book, pdf, video, gallery) working correctly with proper navigation and download functionality.

test_results.step_5_page_loads: PASS - Step 5 (Resultado) page loads correctly when clicking on completed project
test_results.livro_animado_book_preview: PASS - Opens Book Preview modal with embedded iframe showing interactive book
test_results.storyboard_pdf_preview: PASS - Opens PDF Preview modal showing grid of 84 storyboard illustrations with download button
test_results.videos_por_cena_video_player: PASS - Opens Video Player modal with scene navigation buttons (23 buttons for 21 videos)
test_results.individual_scene_video_cards: PASS - Individual scene video cards open Video Player modal when clicked
test_results.download_buttons: PASS - Download buttons visible and functional in all preview modals
test_results.close_x_button: PASS - X button closes all preview modals correctly
test_results.escape_key_closes_modal: PASS - Escape key closes preview modals
test_results.scene_navigation: PASS - Scene navigation buttons switch between scenes in video player

test_results.arrow_key_navigation: PASS - Left/Right arrow keys navigate in gallery view
